payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, the permitted operation is: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10. A DELETE FROM memory_cards operation is denied. The semicolon/punctuation separates the allowed SELECT example from the denied DELETE example and does not change the access rule.
citations: Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an admin SQL permission/debug scenario, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Preserved the distinction between allowed SELECT and denied DELETE.
No durable memory card was created.
